query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "arcane: do role-playing language agents stay in character at the right" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on the pedagogical application of LLMs in educational role-playing games to enhance student engagement, which is an off-domain application compared to the user's specific question about the linguistic mechanisms of character consistency ("staying in character") in role-playing agents. It does not measure the same biological pathway, physical observable, or causal mechanism regarding agent behavior stability, nor does it provide a foundational methodology or empirical baseline f
